title: Forsheda Stlverktyg
description: stalverktyg.com zoominfo.com/c/forsheda-stlverktyg-ab/345814836 Forsheda Stalverktyg AB is a Swedish industrial company founded in 1961 by Sigfrid Johansson, based in Forsheda, Sweden. For over 60 years, it has developed, manufactured, and serviced high-quality injection molding tools for the plastics, rubber, and metal industries. The company manages the full tool lifecycle — from product idea and manufacturing to repair and modification — and is certified to ISO 9001:2015 and ISO 14001:2015. It employs 11–50 people and collaborates with international suppliers in Asia
